phrases.cultural_note: ATMs are commonly clustered near major intersections or pharmacies.

likely_response.translation_en: On the corner, next to the pharmacy.

responses.english: On the corner, next to the pharmacy.

phrases.cultural_note: While widespread, smaller market stalls may still be cash-only.

likely_response.local: Většina obchodů ano, některé stánky berou jen hotovost.
likely_response.translation_en: Most shops yes, some stalls take only cash.

responses.english: Most shops yes, some stalls take only cash.
responses.local: Většina obchodů ano, některé stánky berou jen hotovost.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I buy tram tickets?
phrases.text_local: Kde si můžu koupit lístky na tramvaj?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket machines are located at tram stops, not on the trams themselves.

likely_response.local: U automatu na zastávce, hned tady vpravo.
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket machine at the stop, just here on the right.

responses.english: At the ticket machine at the stop, just here on the right.
responses.local: U automatu na zastávce, hned tady vpravo.
